messages.该选择已失效，请重新发起选择: This selection has expired. Please start the selection again
messages.会话不存在或无权访问: The conversation does not exist or you do not have access
messages.未提供有效的整理记录: No valid organization record was provided
messages.请配置LLM提供商和模型: Please configure the LLM provider and model
messages.请先配置 LLM 模型: Please configure the LLM model first
messages.请先配置 LLM API Key: Please configure the LLM API Key first
messages.刮削失败，无法识别媒体信息: Scraping failed: unable to recognize media information
messages.您已注册通行密钥，为了防止域名配置变更导致无法登录，请先删除所有通行密钥再关闭: You have registered a passkey. To prevent login issues after domain configuration changes, delete all passkeys before disabling OTP verification
messages.为了确保在域名配置错误时仍能找回访问权限，请先启用 OTP 验证码再注册通行密钥: To ensure access can be recovered when domain configuration is incorrect, enable OTP verification before registering a passkey
messages.通行密钥不存在或无权删除: The passkey does not exist or you do not have permission to delete it
messages.通行密钥不存在或不属于当前用户: The passkey does not exist or does not belong to the current user
messages.没有传入仓库地址，无法正确安装插件，请检查配置: No repository URL was provided, so the plugin cannot be installed. Please check the configuration
messages.未识别到豆瓣媒体信息: Unable to recognize Douban media information
messages.未识别到TMDB媒体信息: Unable to recognize TMDB media information
messages.用户未通过认证，无法使用站点功能！: User authentication has not passed, so site features cannot be used.
messages.该站点不支持，请检查站点域名是否正确: This site is not supported. Please check whether the site domain is correct
messages.站点不支持索引或未通过用户认证！: The site does not support indexing or user authentication has not passed!
messages.请输入认证站点和认证参数: Please enter the authentication site and authentication parameters
messages.所有配置项更新成功: All configuration items were updated successfully
messages.无法访问 Wiki 插件仓库清单: Unable to access the Wiki plugin repository list
messages.未在 Wiki 中识别到插件仓库地址: No plugin repository URL was found in the Wiki
messages.不符合过滤规则！: Does not match the filter rules!
messages.测试目标发生了未授权跳转: Test target performed an unauthorized redirect
messages.测试目标重定向次数过多: Test target redirected too many times
messages.当前运行环境不支持重启操作！: The current runtime environment does not support restart!
messages.当前运行环境不支持升级操作！: The current runtime environment does not support upgrade!
messages.TheMovieDb 识别缓存不存在: TheMovieDb recognition cache does not exist
messages.豆瓣识别缓存不存在: Douban recognition cache does not exist
messages.密码需要同时包含字母、数字、特殊字符中的至少两项，且长度大于6位: Password must contain at least two of letters, numbers, and special characters, and be longer than 6 characters
messages.已存在相同名称的工作流: A workflow with the same name already exists
messages.请填写工作流ID、分享标题和分享人: Please fill in workflow ID, share title, and sharer
messages.actions字段JSON格式错误: The actions field contains invalid JSON
messages.flows字段JSON格式错误: The flows field contains invalid JSON
messages.context字段JSON格式错误: The context field contains invalid JSON
messages.event_conditions字段JSON格式错误: The event_conditions field contains invalid JSON
messages.定时工作流缺少定时器配置: Scheduled workflow is missing timer configuration
messages.未配置站点或未通过用户认证: No sites are configured or user authentication has not passed
messages.Redis连接失败，请检查配置: Redis connection failed. Please check the configuration
messages.鉴权已过期或无效: Authentication has expired or is invalid
messages.仿真登录失败，Cookie已失效！: Simulated login failed. Cookie has expired!
messages.系统正在停止，同步被中断: The system is stopping, and sync was interrupted
messages.下载字幕文件失败：未收到站点响应: Failed to download subtitle file: no site response was received
messages.下载被事件取消: Download was cancelled by an event
messages.媒体信息中没有季集信息: Media information does not contain season and episode details
messages.文件整理模块运行失败: File organization module failed to run
messages.没有可用于识别的样本文件: No sample files are available for recognition
messages.当前选择不满足智能识别条件: The current selection does not meet intelligent recognition requirements
messages.无法连接到授权服务器: Unable to connect to the authorization server
messages.授权服务器返回数据不完整: The authorization server returned incomplete data
messages.此存储不支持 OAuth2 授权: This storage does not support OAuth2 authorization
messages.添加种子任务失败：无法读取种子文件: Failed to add torrent task: unable to read torrent file
messages.无法连接qbittorrent下载器: Unable to connect to qBittorrent downloader
messages.无法连接transmission下载器: Unable to connect to Transmission downloader
messages.无法连接rTorrent下载器: Unable to connect to rTorrent downloader
messages.获取种子文件失败，下载任务可能在暂停状态: Failed to get torrent file. The download task may be paused
messages.Github Token已失效，请检查配置: GitHub token has expired. Please check the configuration
messages.触发限流，请配置Github Token: Rate limit triggered. Please configure a GitHub token
messages.当前没有正在执行的任务: There is currently no running task
messages.字幕下载链接签名无效: Subtitle download URL signature is invalid
messages.字幕站点信息不存在: Subtitle site information does not exist
messages.附件不存在或已过期: Attachment does not exist or has expired
messages.附件超过 32MB，无法发送给智能助手: The attachment exceeds 32MB and cannot be sent to the assistant
messages.认证票据无效或已过期: Authentication ticket is invalid or has expired
messages.用户不存在或已禁用: The user does not exist or has been disabled
messages.需要双重验证，请提供验证码或使用通行密钥: Two-factor verification is required. Provide a verification code or use a passkey
messages.智能助手未启用，请先在系统设置中开启。: The assistant is not enabled. Enable it in system settings first.
messages.语音识别失败，请稍后重试。: Speech recognition failed. Please try again later.
messages.请输入要发送给智能助手的内容或选择附件。: Enter content to send to the assistant or choose an attachment.
messages.微信 ClawBot 通知未启用或配置尚未保存，请先保存并启用当前渠道: WeChat ClawBot notification is not enabled or the configuration has not been saved. Please save and enable this channel first
messages.请输入至少一个有效的站点 ID: Enter at least one valid site ID
messages.请输入订阅 ID，多个 ID 用空格分隔，或输入 all: Enter subscription IDs separated by spaces, or enter all
messages.请输入至少一个有效的订阅 ID: Enter at least one valid subscription ID
messages.未从本地CookieCloud服务加载到cookie数据，请检查服务器设置、用户: No cookie data was loaded from the local CookieCloud service. Please check the server settings, user key, and encryption password
messages.CookieCloud请求失败，请检查服务器地址、用户KEY及加密密码是否正确: CookieCloud request failed. Please check the server address, user key, and encryption password
messages.目录中没有可用于识别的媒体文件: No media files are available for recognition in the directory
messages.无匹配自定义定位规则，智能生成失败: No matching custom locating rule was found, and intelligent generation failed
messages.样本命名与原生识别结果冲突，建议补充集数定位规则: Sample naming conflicts with the native recognition result. Add an episode locating rule
messages.有效正片样本覆盖率不足，建议补充集数定位规则: Valid main-video sample coverage is insufficient. Add an episode locating rule
messages.样本命名差异过大，建议补充集数定位规则: Sample naming differences are too large. Add an episode locating rule
messages.样本不足，仅基于单文件智能生成（仅供参考）: Insufficient samples. Generated intelligently from a single file only (for reference)
messages.已放宽体积限制智能生成模板（仅供参考）: Generated template after relaxing the size limit (for reference)
messages.已结合原生集数识别智能生成模板（仅供参考）: Generated template using native episode recognition (for reference)
messages.已根据多数派样本智能生成模板（仅供参考）: Generated template from the majority of samples (for reference)
messages.无匹配自定义定位规则，已智能生成（仅供参考）: No matching custom locating rule was found. Generated intelligently (for reference)
messages.样本未识别到有效集数，智能生成失败: No valid episode number was recognized from the sample, and intelligent generation failed
messages.主运行环境已恢复: Main runtime environment has been restored
messages.[PIP] 所有策略均安装依赖失败，请检查网络连接、PIP 配置或插件依赖约束: [PIP] All dependency installation strategies failed. Please check the network connection, PIP configuration, or plugin dependency constraints
messages.可执行文件模式下，只能安装本地插件: In executable mode, only local plugins can be installed
messages.本地插件来源与插件ID不匹配: Local plugin source does not match the plugin ID
messages.本地插件来源不能与运行目录相同: Local plugin source cannot be the same as the runtime directory
messages.本地插件来源路径无效: Local plugin source path is invalid
messages.插件在仓库中不存在或返回数据格式不正确: The plugin does not exist in the repository or the returned data format is invalid
messages.没有传入需要安装的依赖项: No dependencies to install were provided
messages.连接MoviePilot服务器失败: Failed to connect to MoviePilot server
messages.当前没有开启订阅数据共享功能: Subscription data sharing is not enabled
messages.当前没有开启工作流数据共享功能: Workflow data sharing is not enabled
messages.请分享有动作和流程的工作流: Please share a workflow that contains actions and flows
messages.升级模式仅支持 release 或 dev: Upgrade mode only supports release or dev
messages.当前实例不是由 moviepilot CLI 启动，无法执行内建重启！: The current instance was not started by moviepilot CLI, so built-in restart cannot be performed!
messages.已检测到自动升级模式 dev，正在重启并执行升级: Auto-upgrade mode dev detected. Restarting and upgrading
messages.已检测到自动升级已开启，正在重启并执行升级: Auto-upgrade is enabled. Restarting and upgrading
messages.未登录，缺少 bot token: Not logged in, missing bot token
messages.未登录，请先扫码完成绑定: Not logged in. Scan the QR code to complete binding first
messages.旧名称或新名称不能为空: Old name and new name cannot be empty
messages.通知名称未变化，无需迁移登录缓存: Notification name has not changed. No login cache migration is needed
messages.未找到可迁移的微信 ClawBot 登录缓存: No WeChat ClawBot login cache available for migration was found
messages.新名称下已存在登录缓存，跳过迁移: Login cache already exists under the new name. Migration skipped
messages.未配置媒体服务器，跳过同步: No media server configured, skipping sync
Recommendation data refresh completed, caching posters ...
messages.未配置下载器监控目录，跳过整理: No downloader watch directory configured, skipping organization
messages.没有已完成下载但未整理的任务: No completed but unorganized download tasks
messages.未开启任何有效站点，无法搜索资源: No valid site is enabled, unable to search resources
messages.未开启任何支持字幕搜索的有效站点，无法搜索字幕: No valid subtitle-search site is enabled, unable to search subtitles
messages.没有缓存资源，跳过订阅匹配: No cached resources, skipping subscription matching
messages.未配置 Follow 订阅用户，跳过刷新: No Follow subscription users configured, skipping refresh
